moments.title: England vs Ghana in World Cup Group Stage
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 continues today with England facing Ghana in a Group Stage match in Boston, USA.

angles.name: Match Day Hype
angles.copy: It's match day! England take on Ghana in the World Cup Group Stage later today. Where are you watching the game?

angles.name: Pre-Match Build Up
angles.copy: All eyes on Boston today as England look to secure vital points against Ghana in the World Cup. Kick-off is 4 PM ET / 9 PM UK time. Who's feeling confident? #EngvsGha

moments.title: Taylor Swift holds UK No.1 Single
moments.blurb: Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' remains at No. 1 on the Official UK Singles Chart for a second consecutive week, achieving the biggest weekly chart total of 2026.

angles.name: Chart Reign
angles.copy: She's done it again! Taylor Swift's 'I Knew It, I Knew You' is still your UK Number 1 single for a second week running. The Swiftie reign continues! ✨

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: Another week, another record for Taylor Swift! 'I Knew It, I Knew You' not only holds the top spot but also bagged the biggest weekly chart total of 2026. Iconic.

moments.title: Niall Horan tops UK Albums Chart
moments.blurb: Niall Horan's 'Dinner Party' has debuted at number one on the Official UK Albums Chart for the week ending June 18, 2026.

angles.name: Album Chart Topper
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Niall Horan! His new album 'Dinner Party' has gone straight to Number 1 on the Official UK Albums Chart! What's your favourite track?

angles.name: New Music Celebrations
angles.copy: Weekend listening sorted! Niall Horan has claimed the UK's Number 1 album with 'Dinner Party'. Give it up for the former One Direction star!

moments.title: Love Island 2026 heats up
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island, which began on June 1st, continues to air Sunday to Friday at 9 PM on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily villa drama.

angles.name: Daily Dose of Drama
angles.copy: Who's ready for tonight's dose of Love Island? The drama is bubbling in the villa! What's been your favourite moment so far this series? 🔥 #LoveIsland

angles.name: Summer Viewing
angles.copy: Catching up on Love Island 2026? It's the perfect summer escape! Tune in Sunday-Friday on ITV2 and ITVX for all the latest from the villa.

moments.title: House of the Dragon Season 3 now airing
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated third season of 'House of the Dragon' premiered yesterday, Monday, June 22, at 9 PM on Sky Atlantic, with new episodes arriving weekly.

angles.name: Dragon's Return
angles.copy: The dragons are back! 'House of the Dragon' Season 3 premiered last night on Sky Atlantic. Who's already hooked? 🐉 #HouseOfTheDragon

angles.name: Westeros Wednesday
angles.copy: Still thinking about the 'House of the Dragon' Season 3 premiere? The Targaryen civil war is reaching a climax this season! Catch new episodes weekly.

moments.title: The Bear Season 5 drops this Friday
moments.blurb: The fifth and final season of the critically acclaimed series 'The Bear' is set to stream this Friday, June 26, on Disney+, concluding Carmy's chaotic culinary journey.

angles.name: Kitchen Chaos Returns
angles.copy: Get ready for one last serving! The fifth and final season of 'The Bear' drops this Friday on Disney+. Will Carmy finally get that Michelin star? 🔪 #TheBear

angles.name: Binge-Watching Alert
angles.copy: Clear your weekend plans! 'The Bear' Season 5 is coming to Disney+ this Friday. Prepare for all the intensity, drama, and delicious food you've come to love.

moments.title: Madonna on Graham Norton this Friday
moments.blurb: Ahead of her new album 'Confessions II' in July, Madonna will sit down with Graham Norton for an intimate discussion, airing this Friday, June 26, on BBC.

angles.name: Queen of Pop Interview
angles.copy: Madonna on Graham Norton this Friday! Get ready for an in-depth chat with the Queen of Pop herself, ahead of her new album 'Confessions II'. You won't want to miss it.

angles.name: Weekend TV Must-See
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! Graham Norton sits down with the iconic Madonna this Friday on BBC. What questions do you hope he asks?

moments.title: BST Hyde Park kicks off this weekend
moments.blurb: British Summer Time Hyde Park festival begins this Saturday, June 27, running across weekends until July 12, featuring headliners like Lewis Capaldi, Pitbull, and Mumford & Sons.

angles.name: London Festival Vibes
angles.copy: London, get ready! BST Hyde Park kicks off this weekend with a massive lineup including Lewis Capaldi and Mumford & Sons. Who are you excited to see? 🎶

angles.name: Summer of Music
angles.copy: The summer festival season is in full swing as BST Hyde Park opens its gates this Saturday! Two weeks of incredible music in the heart of London.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival wrap-up
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival just wrapped up in Glasgow Green, Scotland, from June 19-21, with headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi delivering a weekend of music.

angles.name: Glasgow Green Memories
angles.copy: What a weekend in Glasgow! TRNSMT Festival brought the noise with Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi. What were your highlights? 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿 #TRNSMT

angles.name: Festival Afterglow
angles.copy: Still buzzing from TRNSMT? From Wolf Alice to Nile Rodgers & Chic, Glasgow Green was absolutely electric. Relive your favourite moments!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival highlights
moments.blurb: The Isle of Wight Festival concluded on June 21st, after a weekend of performances from headliners like Lewis Capaldi, The Cure, and the Sex Pistols at Seaclose Park.

angles.name: Island Festival Fun
angles.copy: That's a wrap for the Isle of Wight Festival 2026! What an incredible weekend of music with Lewis Capaldi, The Cure, and so many more. Who was there?

angles.name: Post-Festival Blues
angles.copy: Missing the Isle of Wight Festival already? From legendary acts to rising stars, it was a weekend to remember. What was your favourite performance?

moments.title: Reading & Leeds Festival 2026 lineup unveiled
moments.blurb: The first wave of headliners for Reading & Leeds Festival 2026, taking place August 27-30, has been announced, including Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine, and Raye.

angles.name: Festival Season Buzz
angles.copy: Dreaming of August? Reading & Leeds Festival has dropped its first wave of headliners! Charli XCX, Dave, Florence + The Machine, and Raye are all set to play. Get planning!

angles.name: Who's Going?
angles.copy: Reading & Leeds 2026 is shaping up to be massive! With a diverse lineup across rock, pop, and hip hop, there's something for everyone. Who are you hoping to catch?

moments.title: Mick Fleetwood's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: Mick Fleetwood, legendary drummer and co-founder of Fleetwood Mac, celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, June 24. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday for tomorrow to the one and only Mick Fleetwood! The iconic Fleetwood Mac drummer is still an absolute legend. What's your favourite Mac track?

angles.name: Fleetwood Mac Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating Mick Fleetwood's 79th birthday! Co-founder of Fleetwood Mac and a true rock and roll icon. What a career!

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Multi-award-winning singer-songwriter Lionel Richie turns 77 tomorrow, June 24. He was born in 1949.

angles.name: Hello Lionel
angles.copy: Is it you we're looking for? Tomorrow, the incredible Lionel Richie celebrates his 77th birthday! Get ready for some classic hits. 🎉

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the legendary Lionel Richie! From The Commodores to his solo success, what's your favourite Lionel song?

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande will celebrate her 33rd birthday this Friday, June 26. She was born in 1993 and recently had a UK No.1 single.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: This Friday, we're celebrating Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday! With a recent UK Number 1 under her belt, it's been another huge year for the pop star.

angles.name: Birthday Wishes
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 33rd birthday to Ariana Grande on Friday! What's your ultimate Ariana track?

moments.title: KT Tunstall's 51st Birthday
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter KT Tunstall will celebrate her 51st birthday on Sunday, June 29. She was born in 1975.

angles.name: Scottish Talent
angles.copy: This Sunday, we're raising a glass to Scottish talent as KT Tunstall turns 51! What's your favourite track from the 'Suddenly I See' singer?

angles.name: Weekend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 51st birthday for Sunday to the brilliant KT Tunstall! Celebrate her special day with some of her fantastic hits.

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays approaching
moments.blurb: The summer school holidays in England and Wales are set to begin around July 20, with Northern Ireland starting July 1 and Scotland around July 2.

angles.name: Holiday Countdown
angles.copy: Counting down to the summer holidays? Schools in England and Wales break up around July 20th! What are your plans for the long break? ☀️

angles.name: Planning Ahead
angles.copy: Summer holidays are just around the corner for many! Scotland and Northern Ireland schools are out even sooner. Time to start planning those family adventures!

moments.title: Scotland World Cup Anthem hits charts
moments.blurb: Nick Morgan's unofficial team anthem 'No Scotland, No Party', revived for their World Cup 2026 participation, is set to make its maiden appearance inside the UK charts at No. 32.

angles.name: Tartan Army Anthem
angles.copy: Up the Tartan Army! Nick Morgan's 'No Scotland, No Party' is officially heading for the UK charts, celebrating Scotland's World Cup run! 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿

angles.name: Chart Debut
angles.copy: From Euro 2024 to the World Cup 2026, 'No Scotland, No Party' is making waves beyond the stands, debuting in the Official UK Charts at No. 32! Get it listened to!
